---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- HEADER -->
<section class="projects-hero fade-in">
  <p class="projects-eyebrow">Work</p>
  <h1 class="projects-headline">Projects</h1>
  <p class="projects-sub">Statistical models, interactive tools, and data pipelines at the intersection of neurological research and infectious disease.</p>
</section>

<!-- FEATURED CARD — EEG Dashboard -->
<div class="featured-card fade-in">
  <div class="featured-card-visual">
    <div>
      <div class="fv-label">Interactive Dashboard</div>
      <div class="fv-title">EEG Biomarker<br>Explorer</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="featured-card-body">
    <div class="proj-tags">
      <span class="proj-tag">R Shiny</span>
      <span class="proj-tag">EEG</span>
      <span class="proj-tag">Alzheimer&rsquo;s</span>
      <span class="proj-tag">Data Visualization</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-title">EEG Biomarker Dashboard</div>
    <p class="proj-desc">An interactive Shiny dashboard comparing resting-state EEG biomarkers
    between Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) and Alzheimer&rsquo;s Disease patients. Built using
    R Shiny and flexdashboard with data from the Goizueta Brain Health Institute at Emory University.</p>
    <div class="proj-links">
      <a href="https://youwei-hu.shinyapps.io/dashboard_app/" target="_blank" class="proj-link-primary">Live Demo &nearr;</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/hww228/data555_Dashboard" target="_blank" class="proj-link-secondary">GitHub &nearr;</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROJECT GRID -->
<div class="projects-grid">

  <!-- Bayesian Viral Shedding -->
  <div class="proj-card fade-in">
    <div class="proj-card-visual">
      <span>Bayesian Hierarchical Model</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card-body">
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">Stan</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Bayesian</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Infectious Disease</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">R</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card-title">Bayesian Modeling of Viral Shedding Dynamics</div>
      <p class="proj-card-desc">A Bayesian hierarchical model in Stan to characterize viral shedding
      dynamics by integrating heterogeneous lab measurements, including viral load and Ct values.
      Accounts for censoring and estimates a shared latent viral trajectory.</p>
      <div class="proj-links">
        <a href="bayesianmodel.html" class="proj-link-primary">View Project &rarr;</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/hww228/Shedding-Kinetics-Modeling" target="_blank" class="proj-link-secondary">GitHub &nearr;</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Shedding Hub Pipeline -->
  <div class="proj-card fade-in d1">
    <div class="proj-card-visual">
      <span>Data Engineering Pipeline</span>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-card-body">
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">Data Pipeline</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">LLM</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">YAML</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Longitudinal Data</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card-title">Viral Shedding Data Integration Pipeline</div>
      <p class="proj-card-desc">Literature review to identify individual-level longitudinal viral
      shedding datasets. Manual extraction combined with an LLM-powered pipeline to parse data
      into standardized YAML files, building a benchmark dataset for AI training and validation.</p>
      <div class="proj-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/hww228/shedding-hub" target="_blank" class="proj-link-secondary">GitHub &nearr;</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
